creator: maniactraq@gmail.com
text: I hope it's ok to comment here and forgive my ignorance but is there a way pdflib 9 (http://www.pdflib.com/download/pdflib-family/pdflib/) can be added to ports so that it can be used with other programs that require PDF but don't give the option to disable (IE joomla3). Or is it not that simple?
